problem id: c0788894
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) OR SHR(1)

examples:
  00111110 -> 11111111
  11101011 -> 01111111
  10000000 -> 01000100
  11110011 -> 11111111
  10111101 -> 11111111
  10110101 -> 11111111
  10001001 -> 01001100
  00000011 -> 00011001
  01010101 -> 10101010
  01100101 -> 00111011

query: 01111101
predicted answer: 11111111
